title: Read-only audit in /Users/masayuki/Dev/x-auto for policy-level prevention. Evaluate remaining queue_audit warnings (NOTE_WITH_IMAGE, QUOTE_REPLY_CHAIN_ONLY) and determine which should remain warnings vs become blockers, given the recent incidents. Provide a concrete recommendation and rationale. Do...
summary_text: Recommendation (read-only audit): 1. `NOTE_WITH_IMAGE` should become a blocker for `approved` posts (keep warning for `draft`). - Rationale: policy says note promos should be OGP-first and no image ([CLAUDE.md](/Users/masayuki/Dev/x-auto/CLAUDE.md:333), [CLAUDE.md](/Users/masayuki/Dev/x-auto/CLAUDE.md:288)). - Current scheduler behavior with `image_path` on a note post shifts it to image-post mode, strips URL from main text, and sends URL in reply-chain ([scheduler.py](/Users/masayuki/Dev/x-auto/scheduler.py:676), [scheduler.py](/Users/masayuki/Dev/x-auto/scheduler.py:699), [scheduler.py](/Users/masayuki/Dev/x-auto/scheduler.py:727)). - This is a policy-level rendering/CTA regression risk, not just cosmetic. One such `approved` row is currently queued ([post_queue.json](/Users/masayuki/Dev/x-auto/post_queue.json:67)). 2. `QUOTE_REPLY_CHAIN_ONLY` should remain a warning in `queue_audit`, not a hard blocker. - Rationale: reply-chain citation is currently the intentional fallback due X API quote limitations ([CLAUDE.md](/Users/masayuki/Dev/x-auto/CLAUDE.md:168), [CLAUDE.md](/Users/masayuki/Dev/x-auto/CLAUDE.md:169)). - You already have an explicit approval-time guard: `apply_post_package` blocks this unless `--allow-reply-chain-citation` is passed ([apply_post_package.py](/Users/masayuki/Dev/x-auto/scripts/apply_post_package.py:110), [apply_post_package.py](/Users/masayuki/Dev/x-auto/scripts/apply_post_package.py:127), [apply_post_package.py](/Users/masayuki/Dev/x-auto/scripts/apply_post_package.py:193)). - Hard-blocking in `queue_audit` would stop currently scheduled intentional quote-derived posts ([post_queue.json](/Users/masayuki/Dev/x-auto/post_queue.json:88), [post_queue.json](/Users/masayuki/Dev/x-auto/post_queue.json:422), [post_queue.json](/Users/masayuki/Dev/x-auto/post_queue.json:443), [post_queue.json](/Users/masayuki/Dev/x-auto/post_queue.json:485)). Concrete policy-level prevention change to adopt: - Promote `NOTE_WITH_IMAGE` to blocker when `status=approved`. - Keep `QUOTE_REPLY_CHAIN_ONLY` as warning, but require explicit acknowledgment at approval path (already in apply flow) and treat missing acknowledgment as blocker only at approval boundary, not globally in queue audit.
